feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: AA347 Error When Posting MIRO in SAP S/4HANA Cloud – FI-AA Fiscal Year Not Updated
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am attempting to post a vendor invoice using transaction MIRO, and I am receiving the following error message:

“Cannot post to fixed assets in company code XXXX and fiscal year 2026.
Message No.: AA347
Diagnosis: The fiscal year change has not yet been performed in Fixed Asset Accounting for company code XXXX.
Procedure: Verify the reference date.”

This issue started after migrating to SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

The fiscal year 2025 has already been closed. However, I observed the following:

  • Transaction AJRW is not available in the system.

  • In transaction OAAQ, the fiscal year for the company code still shows 2025.

  • All functional checks were performed (AJAB, OB52, OAAQ, posting dates).

  • The root cause identified is that the FI-AA technical fiscal year in table T093C (field LGJAHR – Current Fiscal Year) remains in 2025, although it should be 2026.

Due to this inconsistency, the MIRO posting cannot be completed.

I kindly request SAP Support to realign the FI-AA fiscal year to 2026 in order to resolve this issue and allow the MIRO posting to be processed successfully.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Ronald Onton

entry.title: Unable to post Fixed Asset GRN - Balance Carryforward is required
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

We are facing an issue while posting Goods Receipt (GRN) for Asset procurement in our SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud system. I m trying to posting 2026 GRN with newly created assets. While posting GRN for an asset, the system throws an error related to  Balance Carryforward is required in year. Due to this error, the GRN posting is not allowed.

As per our understanding, capitalization of newly created assets should be allowed without requiring asset balance carryforward, since there are no opening balances involved for new assets.

we request you guidance on this. 

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: default issuing storage location in purchase requisition after MRP execution. PR automacally generat
entry.content:
Hi everybody,
I need to maintain a default Storage location, which has to be chosen in automatically created Purchase Requisition (in MRP) after I execute the MRP.
After execution of MRP (from any requirement e.g. a reservation Transaction  MB21, MD61, etc,,,), a purchase requisition has to be issued automatically. Both issuing St. Location (should be 2000) and receiving St. Location (should be 2900) are within the same plant.
I can see in my purchase requisition that the plant and the Purchase organistion but NOT the issuing Storage location(2000).


Maybe I can use the MRP Area in the customizing and filled this in in the material master data?

Can I do this in sap standard without having to use any BADI?
Here are the entries in MRP Area in SAP IMG -> Production -> Material Requirements Planning -> Master Data -> MRP Areas -> Define MRP Areas for Plant/Storage Locations


And in Material Master


Special Procurement

Thank you for any suggestion 😊
BR,

entry.title: BADI / Enhancement Spot For Adding Custom Email in Standard Workflow
entry.content:
We are trying to add the custom email functionality within the standard Workflow (WS50100021). This workflow already sends the notification to the user's my inbox, but the business needs an additional outlook mail before sending notification to my inbox. We are trying to achieve this without taking the copy of standard workflow and also tried implementing the below BADI's. But we are not able to achieve this. 
Kindly suggest if there are any BADI(s) to achieve it. 
Note: We are looking for BADI's during Work item Creation 

/IWWRK/BADI_WF_CUST_EXT_IB  
/IWWRK/ES_WF_MODIFY_ITEMS_IB 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Principal Propagation via SAP Build Work Zone for S/4HANA content not working.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

we configured principal propagation and exposed our S/4 content as described on the following blogs:

  • Exposing Content from SAP S/4HANA
  • 3452851 - Einrichten der Weitergabe von Benutzeridentitäten schrittweise über SAP Cloud Connector - SAP for Me
  • Integration Guide: SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud

It worked fine when we used basic auth in Runtime Destination. When switching to principal propagation it looks like this:

 

Console log:

Heres our Design time

Runtime

 

We also updated the channel manager in work zone after editing the destinations.

SCC Log doesnt show anything suspicious. 
Greetings
Rouven

entry.title: C_IEE2E vs. TS410: Is this the new standard for S/4HANA or a legacy "Business Suite" exam?
entry.content:
I am planning to specialize in SAP S/4HANA and am currently looking at the C_IEE2E certification (SAP Certified: Implementation Consultant - End-to-End Business Processes).

I am confused by the terminology and want to ensure I don't study for an outdated version:

  1. The description I received references "SAP Business Suite," which usually implies the legacy ECC environment.

  2. However, I see online that C_IEE2E is intended to replace the TS410 (Integrated Business Processes in S/4HANA) certification.

My Question: Has anyone taken the C_IEE2E recently? Is this strictly for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and is it now the preferred entry-level certification over the retiring TS410?

I want to ensure my certification path is aligned with the latest S/4HANA innovations, not legacy processes.

Thanks for the guidance!

entry.title: Static URL of the Joule application
entry.content:
As part of activating the Joule plugin in our S/4HANA PCE (on-premise) Fiori LaunchPad I have created a Fiori catalog including a SAPUI5 Fiori App (plugin for Joule) as described in the following SAP Help portal documentation; Configure and Activate Joule Plug-In in a Target Mapping | SAP Help Portal.

The above solution design does not seem to match the fact that we have a Joule subscription/application in each of our four BTP subaccounts that are connected to our four respective S/4 HANA PCE (on-premise) systems (sandbox, development, test, production).

Because, this again means that we have four different URL's for this Joule plugin app:

https://<sandbox subdomain>.eu10.sapdas.cloud.sap/resources/public/webclient/s4
https://<development subdomain>.eu10.sapdas.cloud.sap/resources/public/webclient/s4
https://<test subdomain>.eu10.sapdas.cloud.sap/resources/public/webclient/s4
https://<production subdomain>.eu10.sapdas.cloud.sap/resources/public/webclient/s4

So, finally, this will result in having system specific Fiori catalogs and related roles?!

Is there any way around this?

entry.title: Discrepancy: PAL consumption quantity is 0 despite correct confirmation in Batch BOP - S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am encountering a critical discrepancy in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS03 where "Schedule BOP Run" (Batch) grants the correct confirmed quantity but fails to record the Product Allocation (PAL) consumption.

Scenario:

Material: Relevant for aATP and PAL, Period Type: Day.

PAL Allocation: 100 units on Jan 31st, 100 units on Feb 1st.

PAL Sequence Settings:

Allow Past Periods: ON

Backward Consumption: 1

Forward Consumption: 0

Check Date Type: Material Availability Date (MAD).

Observed Problem:

In Jan: A customer orders 200 units. 100 units are confirmed against the Jan 31st quota, and 100 units remain as a backorder.

In Feb: I run a BOP (Strategy: Redistribute) via the "Schedule BOP Run" app.

Result: The backorder successfully receives a confirmed quantity of 100 units (Total 200 units confirmed).

The Issue: When checking the PAL monitor (e.g., "Monitor Product Allocation Periods"), the consumption quantity for this order shows 0 for both Jan 31st and Feb 1st. The confirmation is saved in the Sales Order, but PAL quotas are not reduced/charged.

Comparison: Using the "Manage Confirmations for Backorders" app (Interactive), the system works perfectly. Thanks to "Allow Past Periods = ON" and "Backward Consumption = 1", it correctly re-reads and allocates both Jan 31st and Feb 1st quotas, recording a total consumption of 200 units.

Questions:

Are there known cases in Batch BOP where the system updates the confirmed quantity in the business document but skips the update to PAL consumption buckets?

Does the batch execution engine handle the synchronization between accumulated backward consumption and database/liveCache updates differently than the interactive app when the MAD is in the past?

Since the interactive app (IBOP) handles the "Redistribute" strategy and backward consumption perfectly, could this be related to asynchronous update tasks or background processing constraints in 2023 FPS03?

Are there any specific SAP Notes regarding "Zero PAL consumption despite confirmation" for scheduled BOP runs?

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Manage Business user
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I previously used the public cloud edition, where I could manage business users (create, change, and display) through the "Maintain Business Users" app. However, now that we are using the private cloud edition, I cannot find a replacement for the "Maintain Business Users" app in Fiori.

Could someone please assist me with this? 

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

entry.title: [Import sales document] How to display log error directly on the import details view?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, using Import sales document App on S/4HANA Cloud Private v2023, I am wondering if there is a possibility to display the log error details on the import details view?

The need is to easily see wich documents cannot be created and why, and export it. For the moment we are able to see which document are failed thanks to the Temporary ID, but this view doesn't show the reason. We have to click on the log information button on each sale document to know the reason. If we have on import of 600 documents and many in errors it is time consuming to click on log information for each document failed...

Thanks for your help,

Amelie

entry.title: 12 characters limit on UserID in SU01
entry.content:
We are not able increase the 12 character limit on UserID created in SU01. it is not accepting UserID longer than 12 characters.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pricing Integration using BAdI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

A pricing engine company would like to integrate their system to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and they would like to have their system integration to adhere to clean core principles of SAP for certification.

Originally it was setup for ECC which later converted to S/4HANA On Prem by using PRCD_ELEMENTS table manipulation to update the pricing in Sales Order but realize that this is not clean core compliant.

Due to time limitation, they are not able to create a new integration from scratch using SAP Cloud API and planning to use BAdI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM to update the pricing conditions in sales orders. 

So the question would be, is this possible? And if it is, will this be clean core compliant?

Thank you.

entry.title: PR/PO deletion Flexible Workflow issue
entry.content:
Currently, the workflow is not triggered when a PR line item is deleted with flexible workflow in place. Additionally, if all PO line items are deleted, the workflow is not re-triggered with flexible workflow in place


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: India Localization: TCS Tax Collected At Source
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the SAP Help Portal localization for India, there is a section on TCS (Tax Collected at Source). That it is applicable even to B2B business scenarios once a certain threshold amount is exceeded. 

However, based on our review of current regulations, it appears that TCS under GST is mainly applicable to e-commerce operators, and that the earlier value-threshold-based TCS under the Income Tax Act (Section 206C(1H)) may no longer be in effect.  

Based on the following government reference (Item No. 66), it appears that a sunset clause has been introduced for Section 206C(1H), making it inapplicable from 1 April 2025: (Please confirm if this is a real government reference)

https://www.pib.gov.in/PressReleseDetailm.aspx?PRID=2223309

“TCS on the sale of goods under Section 206C(1H) has been made ineffective. A sunset clause has been inserted, rendering the provisions inapplicable with effect from 1 April 2025.”

Question 1:
Could you please confirm whether the value-threshold-based TCS under Section 206C(1H) is indeed no longer applicable from April 2025? 

Question 2:
Apart from e-commerce operator scenarios under GST, are B2B (non-ecommerce) no longer affected?

Thank you so much.

entry.title: Automated Exporting and downloading of report to local shared folder
entry.content:
Hi everyone! 👋

I'm working on automating the download of certain reports from SAP to a shared network folder on my PC, and I've hit a small roadblock. Hoping someone here has dealt with this before!

What we've done so far:

  • ✅ Created a shared folder with read and write access
  • ✅ Had SAP whitelist the shared folder IP
  • ✅ Developed a custom Z-program and tested it
  • ✅ Getting "downloading successfully" message

The issue: Despite the success message, no files are actually appearing in the shared folder 

What we found: After some research, it seems we need to:

  • Mount the IP address to the application server
  • Configure the path as a directory in AL11

My question: Has anyone faced a similar situation? If so, could you please walk me through the exact steps needed to get this working? We're running S/4HANA Private Cloud.

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated! Thanks in advance! 🙏

entry.title: Custom Number Range for Business Partner while doing CVI in a ECC to S/4HANA Conversion
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am working on a CVI activity as part of an ECC to S/4HANA Private Cloud conversion project. In the current ECC system, Customers and Vendors share overlapping number ranges—for example, Customers use 100000–199999 and Vendors use 100000–200000.

The client expects the corresponding Business Partners in S/4HANA to follow new, prefixed number ranges:

  • Customer BPs: 1000100000–1000199999
  • Vendor BPs: 2000100000–2000200000

Essentially, they want to add prefixes of 1000 for customer BPs and 2000 for vendor BPs.

Based on my understanding, during CVI we can either:

  1. Use the same number for the BP as the existing Customer/Vendor, or
  2. Use an internal BP number range.

However, we cannot manipulate BP number assignment to automatically add prefixes or transform the number during CVI synchronization.

I would appreciate a peer review to confirm whether my understanding is correct.

If you want, I can also help you draft a more assertive version, a more formal version, or one that includes SAP notes and technical references.

entry.title: SAP HANA Rebates: Partner determination for Contract Rebate
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I have a customer in SAP HANA requesting that in Contract Rebates could be by SHIP TO PARTY instead of PI Invoicing Party.  In configuration I see that I can change the partner but I'm not sure if all Invoice documents will be taken into account since Invoice documents have not Ship to party partner.

Could you please help me to understand if I change Contract Rebates partner to SH will be take all Invoice document for Settlement?

 

Regards

Mirtha

entry.title: Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 000 not filled error for in CJ88
entry.content:
We are trying to run settlement of network activity on WBS through CJ88 transaction. Profit center is defined on WBS level and network level as well. System is giving error Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 000 not filled.
Please guide.

entry.title: DRC Portugal PT_WHT_M30 in Private
entry.content:
Hi,

Please, I am trying to implement DRC Portugal PT_WHT_M30 in Private Cloud, but the instructions about this are a bit lacking. At the moment I was able to generate the PDF, but I need to know how to create the file in XML and understand why exempt suppliers who have a Portuguese NIF are disregarded.

Best regards.

entry.title: CTS_PROJECT needed for Transport of copies in ADT
entry.content:
Dear Members,

in SAP GUI for Transport (Workbench/Customizing) a CTS_PROJECT is obligatory. However for Transport of Copies, there is no such field to be filled in of course. So far so good.

I am having the issue, that when I want to create a transport of copy in Transport Organiser (ADT), I am asked to fill in a CTS_PROJECT, but the field is inactive. Therefore I cannot create the transport of copy. A bit of a catch 22.
Does anybody have an idea how to solve this issue?
I can of course use the GUI to get the job done, but it is a bit disheartening regarding ADT usage.

Thanks in advance!
